title: POI分析
description: Provider-maintained JSON parameter schema. Defaults are sourced from the provider test-case default parameter file; the C++ JSON string interface remains unchanged.

analysisType.title: Analysis Type
analysisType.description: 数据分析类型。0 棋盘格对比度；1 亮度均匀性 min/max；2 亮度均匀性 1-(max-min)/average；3 亮度均匀性 (max-min)/average；4 亮度均匀性 1-(max-average)/average；7 uv 方差最大值；8 cie_x/cie_y 极差；16 色差；26 亮色度平均值。
analysisType.$comment: Provider note: keep JSON path '$.analysisType' compatible with the C++ JSON interface; update default/type only with the provider contract.

x-provider.aiHint: Provider-maintained field. Keep the JSON key compatible with the C++ DLL; enrich title/description/unit/range/enum/x-ui as needed.

CheckerboardContrast.title: Checkerboard Contrast
CheckerboardContrast.description: 棋盘格对比度参数，当 analysisType 为 0 时使用。

numX.title: Num X
numX.$comment: Provider note: keep JSON path '$.CheckerboardContrast.numX' compatible with the C++ JSON interface; update default/type only with the provider contract.

firstIsBlack.title: First Is Black
firstIsBlack.description: 棋盘格首个方格是否为黑。
firstIsBlack.$comment: Provider note: keep JSON path '$.CheckerboardContrast.firstIsBlack' compatible with the C++ JSON interface; update default/type only with the provider contract.

notes: Defaults are sourced from the provider-maintained test-case default parameter file.
additionalProperties remains true so provider DLL updates can add fields without being blocked by this schema.
This schema is intended for UI display, validation hints, and provider-maintained documentation only.

providerSchema.purpose: Provider-maintained UI and validation metadata for a JSON string interface.
aiInstructions: Keep JSON property keys compatible with the C++ DLL; C++ receives the JSON string by key.
This schema may update default/type when the provider-maintained defaultparam.txt changes.
Do not set additionalProperties to false; provider DLLs may add fields in later versions.
Prefer enriching title, description, unit, minimum, maximum, enum, examples, and x-ui metadata.
Use description for user-facing explanations. Use $comment or x-provider for maintainer-only notes.

docFiles: 数据分析参数及结果说明.docx
